errors_logged.source: VS Code extension runtime (CodeGPT / performance-tracing extension)
errors_logged.scope: IDE only — NOT in ARCHON-X codebase
errors_logged.resolution: No action required in-repo. Disable or update the offending VS Code extension if it causes instability.

errors_logged.description: Session context exhaustion — builder got stuck mid-BEAD-SYNTHIA-001
errors_logged.root_cause: Long context window overflow; tool-call queue depth exceeded during parallel builds
errors_logged.resolution: Audit file state at session start, identify last completed bead, resume from exact gap
errors_logged.prevention: Always run file-existence audit as first step when resuming — do not re-build files that already exist
recovery_protocol: 2. read first 20 lines of each key file to confirm completeness

errors_logged.description: ActionType used but not defined in chess-theater/src/lib/types/agents.ts
errors_logged.fix_commit: Added ActionType union type before PieceAnimState in agents.ts

errors_logged.description: Duplicate identifier ConnectionStatus in ChessTheater.tsx — type import and component import had same name
errors_logged.fix_commit: Renamed type import to ConnectionStatusType in ChessTheater.tsx

errors_logged.description: Implicit any for obj parameter in PieceAnimator.ts forEach callback
errors_logged.fix_commit: Typed obj as THREE.Object3D in forEach callback

notes.missing_node_modules: chess-theater and synthia-3-0 both need npm install before tsc will resolve three/react/next types. This is expected pre-install state, not a code bug.
notes.skipLibCheck: Both chess-theater and synthia-3-0 tsconfig have skipLibCheck:true — reduces noise during development
